changeSet.author: space
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE preference_time SET preset_code = CASE LOWER(TRIM(preset_code)) WHEN 'morning' THEN 'MORNING' WHEN 'day' THEN 'DAY' WHEN 'evening' THEN 'EVENING' WHEN 'night' THEN 'NIGHT' ELSE UPPER(TRIM(preset_code)) END WHERE time_kind = 'PRESET' AND preset_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(preset_code) <> '';
UPDATE preference_time SET preset_code = NULL WHERE time_kind = 'PRESET' AND preset_code IS NOT NULL AND preset_code NOT IN ('MORNING', 'DAY', 'EVENING', 'NIGHT');
